title: Exhibitions
subtitle: Join us for upcoming exhibitions showcasing Himalayan art and culture

item1.title: Sacred Art of the Himalayas
item1.description: An immersive exhibition featuring rare Thangka paintings and traditional Tibetan art pieces from private collections.

item2.title: Sound & Meditation Experience
item2.description: Explore the healing power of sound through interactive demonstrations with authentic Tibetan singing bowls and meditation practices.

item3.title: Spiritual Artifacts Showcase
item3.description: A curated display of sacred items, ritual objects, and spiritual artifacts from the Himalayan region, celebrating centuries of spiritual tradition.
